title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-QSFP28-LR4 - Optical module, Single-Mode, 100 Gbps, LC UPC Duplex

description: An optical module operating at speeds of up to 100 Gb/s . The module is compatible with QSFP28 and QSFP+ interfaces. It works in Single-mode and ensures a range of up to 10 km Data transfer rate up to 100 Gb/s Range of up to 10 km Single-mode Duplex LC UPC connector
